name: tabula-mcp
description: Let Claude work with people in shared Tabula Markdown workspaces.
long_description: Turn Markdown created in Claude or local files into shared Tabula workspaces. Claude can start or join encrypted live sessions, work with Markdown files and comment threads, export fixed encrypted copies, and import a #json copy for local materialization. Room and copy keys stay in URL fragments; relays and snapshot storage receive encrypted data.

tools.name: start_session
tools.description: Start an encrypted live Tabula session from one or more Markdown files.

tools.name: join_room
tools.description: Join an encrypted live Tabula session from a private #room URL.

tools.name: leave_session
tools.description: Disconnect this Tabula agent from one live session without deleting its files.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List Markdown files and folders in a live session.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read one Markdown file or a bounded line range with its current revision.

tools.name: read_multiple_files
tools.description: Read one or more Markdown files and their current revisions.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search Markdown paths and contents with line-numbered context.

tools.name: list_comments
tools.description: List open, resolved, or all comment threads in a live session.

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a file-level or line-anchored comment to a Markdown file.

tools.name: reply_to_comment
tools.description: Reply to an existing comment thread in a live session.

tools.name: resolve_comment
tools.description: Resolve or reopen a comment thread in a live session.

tools.name: delete_comment
tools.description: Permanently delete a comment thread and its replies.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Create or replace one Markdown file with revision protection.

tools.name: write_files
tools.description: Create or replace one or more Markdown files and their folders in one live session transaction.

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Apply exact, safely rebased replacements and return a bounded diff.

tools.name: create_directory
tools.description: Create a directory and any missing parent directories in a live session.

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move or rename a file or directory in a live session.

tools.name: delete_path
tools.description: Delete a revision-guarded file or an explicitly recursive directory path.

tools.name: import_copy
tools.description: Decrypt a fixed #json copy into relative Markdown paths and contents for local materialization.

tools.name: export_copy
tools.description: Create an encrypted fixed #json copy from Markdown files or a live session.
